summary: Comprehensive testing of SnapRoad Offer Boosting feature completed. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All Boost Center UI elements verified working correctly. Team guide files verified - Apple Maps MapKit references present, Mapbox references are properly instructional ('do NOT use Mapbox').
critical_code_review_comments: Boost pricing endpoint returns 3 packages (basic $9.99/24h, standard $19.99/72h, premium $39.99/168h) with correct structure
BoostModal component in PartnerDashboard.tsx properly displays package selection with credits option
Active boosts endpoint correctly returns boost records with is_active and hours_remaining fields
Trip analytics and route history 3D endpoints return comprehensive data for analytics dashboard
Memory guide files correctly updated - Mapbox references are instructional ('do NOT use') not implementation
seed_data_creation: Backend uses in-memory mock data for offers, boosts, trips, and routes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Boost feature fully tested. Partner Portal at /portal/partner has Boosts tab in sidebar. BoostModal opens from 'Boost Now' buttons. All 3 packages work: Basic ($9.99/24h/1.5x), Standard ($19.99/3d/2x), Premium ($39.99/7d/3x). Credits system visible ($50.00 balance). Trip analytics and route history 3D APIs return mock but realistic data.
mocked_data_note: ALL BOOST, TRIP, AND ROUTE DATA IS MOCKED - Backend uses in-memory storage, resets on restart.

boost_pricing_api.notes: Returns 3 packages with correct prices and durations

create_boost_api.notes: Creates boost for offer, validates offer_id and boost_type

active_boosts_api.notes: Returns list of active boosts with is_active and hours_remaining

trip_history_api.notes: Returns 50 trips with full analytics (distance, fuel, gems, safety)

route_history_3d_api.notes: Returns 7 unique routes with coordinates and trip counts

features: Boost Center header with pricing overview ($9.99, $19.99, $39.99)
Boost an Offer section with 3 offers
Boost Now buttons on each offer

landing_page.notes: Loads correctly with SnapRoad branding, Start Driving button, feature icons

team_guide_updates.notes: All 4 guides verified - Apple Maps MapKit references present, Mapbox mentions are instructional only

backend_tests_summary.TestBoostPricing: 5/5 PASS - pricing, packages structure, basic/standard/premium details
backend_tests_summary.TestCreateBoost: 3/3 PASS - success, invalid offer, invalid type
